prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mitsubishi 4N15 2.4L MIVEC turbodiesel (engine code: 4N15-T6)** with a **Garrett GT2260S turbocharger** (8.5 psi boost) and **Denso GDI fuel injectors (320cc/min)** for a target of 220 hp and 450 Nm torque, paired with a **ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic transmission** with a **Paddle-Shift conversion kit by ATS Racing** for faster shifts.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Milltek Sport** with a **dual-mode valve-controlled rear muffler (Agency Power)** and **4-inch carbon fiber tips**, paired with a **K&N high-flow air filter (57-2585)** and **custom ECU remap by Viezu Technologies (Stage 2+)** to optimize turbo spool and fuel delivery.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (specific to Mitsubishi Triton/L200 chassis)** featuring **24-way adjustable damping**, **polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (SPF0115K, SPF0116K)** for the control arms, and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** to reduce body roll during aggressive cornering.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Design)** adapted for the Fullback’s chassis, including **custom carbon fiber fender flares (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear)**, **front splitter with integrated canards (Seibon Carbon)**, and **rear diffuser with dual exhaust cutouts (VIS Racing)**.

**Custom LED headlight conversion by LUX Automotive** featuring **Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs (H11/HB3)**, **Morimoto XB LED fog lights**, and **RGBW underglow kit by Oracle Lighting (60-inch front, 72-inch rear)** with **Bluetooth control via the Oracle Sync app**.

**Full interior rewrap in Alcantara (Autofiber)** with **custom Recaro SR-7 seats (Mitsubishi Triton/L200 specific mounts)**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **custom gauge cluster overlay by Defi (BF Advance Series) with oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR monitoring**.
